purpose: Monitoring companion for DENG All In One (aio.deng.my.id)
changelog: APK_DISCORD_AUTH_HANDOFF_COMPLETION_FIX_2026_06_14 - Fix Custom Tabs handoff: intent-first apk-open page, dedupe deep links, web-session verify before login.
Detect deep_link_not_received when browser completes OAuth but app never opens.
Verify deng_sid cookie + /api/aio/auth/web-session before marking WebView logged in.
Default site and API base URL: https://aio.deng.my.id.
